{"cards": [{"name": "Molten Convergence", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact. ~ deals 2 damage to that artifact's controller.
• Create two 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens with haste.", "flavor_text": "Three paths of flame, each leading to destruction.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal red instant that showcases red's direct damage, artifact destruction, and token creation. Each mode is appropriately costed for 4 mana, giving flexibility between immediate damage, permanent removal, or board presence."}, {"name": "Song of the Deepwood", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — You gain 2 life for each creature you control.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green Saga that follows the typical progression: ramp early, strengthen your board, then capitalize on your creatures. Each chapter represents a classic green effect, building toward a powerful late-game payoff."}, {"name": "Crystal Cavern", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "Deep beneath the earth, crystalline formations reveal glimpses of what is to come.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless utility land that provides card selection. The scry ability is expensive enough to not be oppressive but useful in longer games. Fits the uncommon complexity level with a simple activated ability."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Where ancient roots intertwine, the songs of growth echo through countless seasons.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the timeless nature of the forest and its connection to growth and continuity."}]}
